### where is Spectre pattern? (1a) {.smaller}

```c
struct Files all_files[NUM_FILES];
int GetLastByteOfFile(int index) {
    if (index >= 0 && index < all_files) {
        struct File *file = &all_files[index];
        if (file->type == MEMORY) {
            return file->data[file->size - 1];
        } else if (file->type == DISK) {
            return GetLastByteOfDiskFile(file)
        } else {
            return -1;
        }
    } else {
        return -1;
    }
}
```

In Spectre-style attack, it will be most useful to learn what cache set is evicted by the
access to ___.

<table>
<tr><td>A. `file->type` </td><td>B. `file->data[file->size - 1]`</td></tr>
<tr><td>C. `file->size`</td><td>D. `index`</td></tr>
</table>

### where is Spectre pattern? (1b) {.smaller}

```c
struct Files all_files[NUM_FILES];
int GetLastByteOfFile(int index) {
    if (index >= 0 && index < all_files) {
        struct File *file = &all_files[index];
        if (file->type == MEMORY) {
            return file->data[file->size - 1];
        } else if (file->type == DISK) {
            return GetLastByteOfDiskFile(file)
        } else {
            return -1;
        }
    } else {
        return -1;
    }
}
```

In Spectre-style attack, the value an attacker will learn the most above is ___.

<table>
<tr><td>A. `file->type` </td><td>B. `file->data[file->size - 1]`</td></tr>
<tr><td>C. `file->size`</td><td>D. `index`</td></tr>
</table>



### where is Spectre pattern? (2) {.smaller}

```c
struct FileInfo all_files[4096];
...

struct SocketInfo all_sockets[4096];

int GetLocalPortFor(int file_number)  {
    if (file_number < 0 || file_number >= 4096) {
        return -1;
    } else if (!all_files[file_number].is_socket) {
        return -1;
    } else {
        int socket_index = all_files[file_number].socket_index;
        struct SocketInio *socket_info = &all_sockets[socket_index];
        return socket_info->local_port;
    }
}
```

If attacker wants to learn the value at address X, they should make it
so address X is the same as the address of ___.

<table>
<tr><td>A. `all_files[file_number].is_socket`</td><td>B. `all_files[file_number].socket_index`</td></tr>
<tr><td>C. `all_sockets[file_number]`</td><td>D. `all_sockets[all_files[file_number].socket_index].local_port`</td>
</table>
